rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Election Code §278.003, which governs candidate informational statements for voter guides in judicial elections.
quote: If the secretary of state implements a voter information service program, a candidate may file with the secretary not later than the 70th day before the date of the judicial election an informational statement, on a form prescribed by the secretary, to be included in the voter information guide for that election.
_note: No conflict; rule_text pertains to election procedure, not property tax exemptions.
